idea-plugin.name: AntV Infographic Markdown Preview
idea-plugin.description:
English

AntV Infographic Markdown Preview

Renders AntV Infographic DSL inside Markdown fenced blocks (infographic language) and in standalone .infographic files. Preview uses @antv/infographic (SVG) through the bundled Markdown preview and JCEF. Same scope as the repository README; requires the official Markdown plugin. Samples: Demo, examples/sample.md. License: MIT. Engine: infographic.antv.vision.

  • Markdown: recognizes fenced code blocks with language infographic.
  • Live preview: renders SVG in the Markdown preview via @antv/infographic.
  • Syntax highlighting: Infographic DSL in fenced blocks and .infographic files (aligned with syntaxes/infographic.tmLanguage.json).
  • .infographic files: dedicated file type; split Editor + Preview using the same preview pipeline (JCEF).
  • Local workflow: no external service; write and preview inside the IDE.

中文

AntV Infographic Markdown 预览

在 JetBrains IDE 中预览 Infographic：支持 Markdown 中语言为 infographic 的围栏代码块，以及独立的 .infographic 文件；通过官方 Markdown 预览与 JCEF，使用 @antv/infographic 输出 SVG。与仓库 README 描述一致。示例见 Demo 与 examples/sample.md。许可：MIT。上游：AntV Infographic · infographic.antv.vision。

  • Markdown 内嵌：识别 infographic 围栏代码块。
  • 实时预览：在 Markdown 预览中渲染 SVG。
  • 语法高亮：围栏内与 .infographic 文件均支持 Infographic DSL 高亮。
  • .infographic 文件：注册文件类型；源码与 Preview 分栏预览（需 JCEF）。
  • 本地工作流：无需外部服务，在 IDE 内编写与预览。
